enterprise_c2_links.name: SIYI Enterprise Links
enterprise_c2_links.note: See radio_manufacturers.json for full profile. Most widely used enterprise link for ArduPilot/PX4 commercial drones. No NDAA-compliant equivalent exists at the same price/feature point.

enterprise_c2_links.name: Hex/CubePilot HereLink

products.note: Blue UAS ecosystem integration. 'Blue' branding but manufactured in China.

enterprise_c2_links.strategic_note: HereLink is the primary GCS for CubePilot Cube-based drones (many Blue UAS platforms). 'HereLink Blue' marketed for defense but HK/China manufactured.

enterprise_c2_links.name: Microhard Systems
enterprise_c2_links.market_position: De facto standard defense/enterprise datalink. Used by most Blue UAS platforms. NDAA compliant.
enterprise_c2_links.manufacturing: Designed and manufactured in Calgary, Canada
enterprise_c2_links.strategic_significance: CRITICAL — only NDAA-compliant high-performance C2 datalink at scale. No US-manufactured alternative.

enterprise_c2_links.name: Silvus Technologies
enterprise_c2_links.market_position: Premium defense MANET mesh with integrated C2. Very high cost limits to military programs.
enterprise_c2_links.manufacturing: Designed and assembled in Los Angeles

enterprise_c2_links.name: Persistent Systems

products.note: Soldier-worn MANET node, also used for drone C2

enterprise_c2_links.market_position: Defense MANET provider. Used for drone-to-soldier mesh networks.

enterprise_c2_links.name: Doodle Labs
enterprise_c2_links.market_position: Growing defense drone datalink. Used by several SOCOM programs.

hobbyist_fpv.current_state: 100% Chinese manufacturing — RadioMaster, Jumper, BETAFPV, Happymodel all Shenzhen-based
hobbyist_fpv.ndaa_alternative: ImmersionRC/Orqa Ghost (Croatia) is only Western manufacturer. Very limited product range.
hobbyist_fpv.gap_severity: LOW concern — hobbyist market not subject to NDAA procurement rules

enterprise_commercial.current_state: SIYI (China) dominates. HereLink Blue (HK/China) used by Blue UAS ecosystem. No NDAA alternative at SIYI price point.
enterprise_commercial.ndaa_alternative: Microhard (Canada) — 3-5x more expensive than SIYI. Doodle Labs growing.
enterprise_commercial.gap_severity: HIGH — SIYI/HereLink deeply embedded in ArduPilot commercial ecosystem

defense.current_state: Microhard (Canada), Silvus (US), Persistent Systems (US), Doodle Labs (US) serve defense market
defense.ndaa_alternative: Multiple NDAA options exist but at 10-50x hobby/enterprise prices
defense.gap_severity: LOW — defense market has allied alternatives, just expensive

rf_silicon.current_state: Semtech (US) SX1280 is sole ELRS RF chip — fabbed at TSMC Taiwan
rf_silicon.ndaa_alternative: No second-source LoRa transceiver exists. Entire ELRS ecosystem is single-source.
rf_silicon.gap_severity: CRITICAL — TSMC dependency for all ELRS silicon. Espressif (China) MCU in most ELRS receivers.
